query:
INSERT INTO system_settings (`key`, `value`, `description`, `updatedAt`)
VALUES ('nas_daily_rate', '0.50', 'Daily billing rate per active NAS device ($15/month ÷ 30 days)', NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE 
  `value` = '0.50',
  `description` = 'Daily billing rate per active NAS device ($15/month ÷ 30 days)',
  `updatedAt` = NOW();
